title: get server status returns ok true
description: Test the GET /status endpoint to ensure it returns a 200 status code with a JSON body containing { ok: true } indicating the server is running.

title: unauthenticated access to get auth me returns 401
description: Test the GET /auth/me endpoint without any session cookie to verify it returns a 401 Unauthorized response indicating no valid session.

title: post auth e2e login sets session cookie and returns 200
description: Test the POST /auth/e2e/login endpoint with valid user details to ensure it returns a 200 status code, sets an httpOnly session cookie, and responds with { ok: true }.

title: authenticated get auth me returns user info
description: Test the GET /auth/me endpoint with a valid session cookie to verify it returns a 200 status code and the correct user information in the response body.

title: unauthenticated access to protected post api support run returns 401
description: Test the POST /api/support/run protected endpoint without authentication to ensure it returns a 401 Unauthorized response.
